public_body: This is the public profile page for @{{username}}. Full stats and prep tools are visible only to the owner.

track.switch_hint: Switch from Hone or directly in settings — this drives Atlas node highlighting, TaskBoard filtering, and which AI-coach is suggested by default for /atlas pills.

general.label: General
general.hint: No track filter — you see all Hone and atlas content.

dev.label: Dev (Go senior)
dev.hint: Senior Go interview prep. Algorithms, system design, distributed.

ml.label: ML Engineering
ml.hint: Senior ML/MLE — classical ML, DL, transformers, LLM/GenAI, ML system design, MLOps.

english.label: English
english.hint: Speaking + writing for tech interviews. Clarity / accuracy / range / fluency.

go.label: Go deep
go.hint: Sub-mode for senior Go devs: runtime, scheduler, GC, profiling, distributed.

ai_card.title: AI coaches
ai_card.empty_lead: You haven't activated any AI coach yet. They answer with memory of past conversations — not «yet another chat», but a personal coach for your track.
ai_card.empty_hint: They activate automatically on first click of a coach pill in Atlas or MockResult.

invites_card.title: You've been invited
invites_card.lead: Tutors want to work with you. After accept, assignments land in Hone TaskBoard and sessions in Calendar.

human_card.title: Human tutors
human_card.empty_lead: You don't have a human tutor connection yet. Got an invite link? Open it to accept the relationship.
human_card.empty_hint: After accept, tutor assignments will land in your Hone TaskBoard automatically, and sessions in Calendar.

quick_links.title: Where next
quick_links.mock_hint: Take a mock with the AI interviewer for a chosen company.

weekly_card.title: Weekly report
weekly_card.body: Recap for the week — focus minutes, mocks, weak spots, track progress. For the long arc.
